summary: Project Management Module testing complete. All 20 backend API tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all major features. One bug was found and fixed (staff-list route ordering issue).
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed projects and templates created during testing (auto-cleanup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Management Module fully tested. Routes: /admin/projects (list), /admin/projects/:projectId (detail with tasks/subtasks/gantt), /admin/project-templates (template management). All data-testid attributes present for automation. 5 default templates seeded (CCTV, Server, Computer, Network, Firewall). Sequential subtask enforcement working correctly.

backend_api_tests.list_templates: PASSED - GET /api/projects/templates returns all templates with subtasks
backend_api_tests.list_projects: PASSED - GET /api/projects returns projects with progress/counts
backend_api_tests.create_project: PASSED - POST /api/projects creates project in planning status
backend_api_tests.get_project_detail: PASSED - GET /api/projects/{id} returns full detail with tasks
backend_api_tests.delete_project: PASSED - DELETE /api/projects/{id} soft deletes and returns 404
backend_api_tests.project_auto_activates: PASSED - Project status changes to active on first task
backend_api_tests.subtask_status_transitions: PASSED - pending -> in-progress -> completed with timestamps
backend_api_tests.subtask_assignment: PASSED - Assigning staff to subtask works
backend_api_tests.delete_task: PASSED - DELETE /api/projects/{id}/tasks/{tid} soft deletes with subtasks
backend_api_tests.staff_list: PASSED - GET /api/projects/staff-list returns staff and members
backend_api_tests.task_auto_completes: PASSED - Task auto-completes when all mandatory subtasks done

frontend_ui_tests.projects_list_page: PASSED - /admin/projects loads with search, status filters, project cards
frontend_ui_tests.create_project_modal: PASSED - Modal with name, company, priority, dates fields
frontend_ui_tests.project_detail_page: PASSED - KPI cards (Tasks, Subtasks, Progress, Status), task list
frontend_ui_tests.add_task_modal: PASSED - Template selector shows subtasks preview
frontend_ui_tests.view_toggle: PASSED - Tasks vs Gantt view toggle works
frontend_ui_tests.gantt_chart: PASSED - CSS-based Gantt chart displays tasks and subtasks
frontend_ui_tests.task_list: PASSED - Expandable tasks with subtask list
frontend_ui_tests.subtask_actions: PASSED - Start/Done buttons, Assign dropdown visible
frontend_ui_tests.sequential_enforcement: PASSED - Only first pending subtask shows action buttons
frontend_ui_tests.subtask_completion_flow: PASSED - Start -> Done with remarks prompt works
frontend_ui_tests.create_template_modal: PASSED - Name, category, description, subtasks fields
frontend_ui_tests.template_expansion: PASSED - Clicking template shows subtask sequence with Edit button
frontend_ui_tests.sidebar_navigation: PASSED - All Projects and Task Templates links in sidebar

bugs_fixed.issue: staff-list route was defined after /{project_id} route, causing 'staff-list' to be treated as a project_id
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved /staff-list route definition BEFORE /{project_id} route to ensure proper route matching
